title: Knysna arts and awareness lifestyle event returns
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Excitement is building as...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Excitement is building as preparations for the second annual Knysna Arts and Awareness Lifestyle Charity Event (KAALCE) are underway.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Excitement is building as preparations for the second annual Knysna Arts and Awareness Lifestyle Charity Event (KAALCE) are underway."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Set to take place in October, this highly anticipated gala promises to surpass the grandeur of its inaugural edition.","html":"Set to take place in October, this highly anticipated gala promises to surpass the grandeur of its inaugural edition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With ticket sales already underway and the event hosted at the stunning Villa Castollini once again, KAALCE is poised to establish itself as the must-attend social event of the season in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Villa Castollini provides the perfect backdrop for an evening of elegance - the event is set to charm attendees with its glamorous ambiance and captivating programme.","html":"Villa Castollini provides the perfect backdrop for an evening of elegance - the event is set to charm attendees with its glamorous ambiance and captivating programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ticket sales for KAALCE went live on 29 April and eager guests can secure their spots on the Villa Castollini website.","html":"Ticket sales for KAALCE went live on 29 April and eager guests can secure their spots on the Villa Castollini website."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alliance Media Management is the driving force behind KAALCE and their team has a shared vision of creating an extraordinary event that celebrates the best of Knysna and to ensure that KAALCE becomes an integral part of the Knysna social calendar.","html":"Alliance Media Management is the driving force behind KAALCE and their team has a shared vision of creating an extraordinary event that celebrates the best of Knysna and to ensure that KAALCE becomes an integral part of the Knysna social calendar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Building on the successes of the previous year, the organisers are committed to making KAALCE even bigger and grander, leaving a lasting impression on attendees.","html":"Building on the successes of the previous year, the organisers are committed to making KAALCE even bigger and grander, leaving a lasting impression on attendees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beyond being a remarkable social affair, KAALCE serves a greater purpose of establishing Knysna as a prestigious travel destination. The event will showcase the diverse talents and offerings of the local community, including tourism, fashion, art, food and entertainment.","html":"Beyond being a remarkable social affair, KAALCE serves a greater purpose of establishing Knysna as a prestigious travel destination. The event will showcase the diverse talents and offerings of the local community, including tourism, fashion, art, food and entertainment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"KAALCE aims to attract visitors from far and wide, contributing to the growth and recognition of the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAALCE has secured partnerships with various sponsors and collaborators, who share the vision of promoting Knysna and supporting local talent. The significance and potential of KAALCE have garnered support from key stakeholders and the event is officially endorsed by the Knysna Municipality and the Garden Route District Municipality.","html":"KAALCE has secured partnerships with various sponsors and collaborators, who share the vision of promoting Knysna and supporting local talent. The significance and potential of KAALCE have garnered support from key stakeholders and the event is officially endorsed by the Knysna Municipality and the Garden Route District Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other committed stakeholders also recognise the event's cultural and economic value.","html":"Other committed stakeholders also recognise the event's cultural and economic value."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This year's Knysna Arts and Awareness Lifestyle Event is one that we should all be supporting. This initiative supports local talent as local talent is one of our biggest drivers of arts and culture development in the region. Knysna Municipality are proud to be partnered with the organisers of this event.\" says Deputy Mayor Alberto Marbi.","html":"\"This year's Knysna Arts and Awareness Lifestyle Event is one that we should all be supporting. This initiative supports local talent as local talent is one of our biggest drivers of arts and culture development in the region. Knysna Municipality are proud to be partnered with the organisers of this event.\" says Deputy Mayor Alberto Marbi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KAALE ambassador and Miss Earth runner up, Angelique Fourie, announcing the live ticket sales.","html":"The KAALE ambassador and Miss Earth runner up, Angelique Fourie, announcing the live ticket sales."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Deputy Mayor Alberto Marbi with Angelique Fourie.","html":"Knysna Deputy Mayor Alberto Marbi with Angelique Fourie."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
